reviews.comment:
Una de las estaciones en CABA que tiene precio más bajo. En esa zona es una de las pocas que hay. Se hace mucha fila y tarda. Ir sin mucho apuro. Aire gratis.

(Translated by Google)
One of the cheapest gas stations in Buenos Aires. It's one of the few in that area. There's a long line and it takes a while. Go when you're not in a hurry. Free air.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMycE92bDJRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Como todo ACA, sólo cumplen con lo mínimo e indispensable para atender al cliente.
Ni un servicio básico. SOLO TE CARGAN COMBUSTIBLE.

(Translated by Google)
Like all gas stations, they only provide the bare minimum to serve the customer. Not even basic service. They just fill up your tank.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXc01uTXlRRRAB
